div.p: los usuarios que tenga cuenta en la universidad, podran ver los dashboards.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51));

fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 51, 51));
